title: plectranthus beddomei
intro: Plectranthus beddomei, also known as Indian coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus beddomei include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Plectranthus beddomei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
